## Background

Describe the skill behavior, source material, or routing gap.

## Goal

State the skill entrypoint, routing, or reference behavior to deliver.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The skill entrypoint stays compact and routes to references when needed.
- [ ] Heavy protocol details are kept out of the entrypoint.
- [ ] Source provenance is recorded when importing or adapting existing material.
- [ ] Tests or deterministic checks cover the changed behavior when applicable.

## Non-goals

- None yet.

## Context Safety

- [ ] No full old thread, report, log, or large source artifact is pasted inline.
- [ ] Large source material is referenced by path, commit, or compact locator.
